description: Take a screenshot of the current page. Returns a data URL: 'data:image/png;base64,...'. The base64 part can be passed to write_file with type='base64;image/png'. When full_page=true and page height exceeds max_height, the screenshot is truncated/cropped at max_height. Example: {"full_page": true}
name: web_screenshot

max_height.description: Max height in pixels for full-page capture. If page is taller, screenshot is truncated at this height (default: 10000)

browser_id.description: Browser instance ID (returned by web_start). If not specified and only one instance exists, that instance is used.
